content.en:
"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, you have gone too far!"

The Xuangui Palace Master appeared and stopped in front of Ye Tian.

After all, the Qinglong Palace Lord is not the real Wanwu Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, in today's Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, he can't control the field at all, but the Qinglong Palace Lord is the closest to here, so he came here for the first time to block the Supreme Dao Ancestors and the Invincible Dao Ancestors from entering the internal space of the Ancient Realm Tree.

Otherwise, a large number of Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors poured in, where would there still be a quota in the Heavenly Emperor Palace!

When the time comes, these Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors have absorbed all the origin energy of the Ancient Origin Tree, even if they kill all this group of Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors, it will be useless.

Now, the arrival of the Xuangui Palace Master, the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, has made the Qinglong Palace Lord a little more confident.

And in the eyes of the Xuangui Palace Lord, no matter how strong Ye Tian's strength is, it can only be compared to the weaker Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, which is also the limit of the Invincible Dao Ancestor.

He didn't think that an invincible Dao Ancestor could compete with him, that wasn't nonsense!

"Xuangui Palace Master, get out of the way!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, our Heavenly Emperor Palace will not let your Terran Race have no quota, but you Terran wants to send 50 people in at once, sorry, this number is too many, your Wanfa Dao Ancestor is not qualified to get so many places. If you Black Wind Mountain get 50 places, then I have no opinion!"

The main road of the Xuangui Palace.

"It's almost as good that the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master of your Heavenly Emperor Palace said that I am not qualified, and your Xuan Turtle Palace Master is not qualified to talk to me!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian took out the Heaven Killing Spear.

Today's Heaven Slaying Spear has already stepped into the semi-domain weapon level after being tempered with many materials, and its power has increased greatly.

"Shadow Thorn!"

A spear pierces through everything.

Although Ye Tian did not exert the power of the Extreme Dao, the attack power of this spear had also reached the extreme of the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

And the Xuangui Palace Master is not the top Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, he is only at the level of the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and his defense power has reached a high level, and his overall strength is between the Medium Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor and the High Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

Burst!!!!

The Heaven Slaying Spear pierced through the Xuan Turtle Palace Lord's Xuan Turtle Shell defense, and injured the Xuan Turtle Palace Master with one blow.

"My defenses have been penetrated !!!"

The Xuan Turtle Palace Lord was shocked.

His defense definitely belongs to the level of the high-level Ten Thousand Realm half-step domain ancestor, and the high-level Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestor is difficult to penetrate his defense with one blow, at most it will shatter his defense.

But Ye Tian's attack easily penetrated his defense, this was undoubtedly an attack at the top Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestor level, and it was the top level among the tops.

"Impossible, you are just an invincible Dao Ancestor realm, how can you use the top Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestor level attack?"

The Xuan Turtle Palace Lord was shocked.

"That's just your loneliness!"

Ye Tian said.

However, due to the obstruction of the Xuan Turtle Palace Master, many half-step domain ancestors from the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain also descended one by one, and it was obvious that they were also very interested in the Ancient Realm Tree.

On the side of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord was the leader, but the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord did not arrive.

On the side of Black Wind Mountain, the Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain did not appear, and Jinchen Daozu led the team.

Jinchen Dao Ancestor is also a half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm, so he can resist the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord, and he does not need the Wind Mountain Lord to come forward.

Although the birth of the Ancient Realm Tree is very important, it is not qualified to let the Heavenly Emperor Palace and Black Wind Mountain be fully dispatched.

After the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord arrived, he stared at Ye Tian and said, "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, you want 50 places, it's a bit excessive, you Black Wind Mountain have so many half-step domain ancestors, I am afraid that there are a bunch of supreme Dao ancestors and invincible Dao ancestors under each half-step domain ancestor, everyone is like you, don't you Black Wind Mountain want thousands of places? But I haven't seen a single Ancient Origin Lake that can supply hundreds of Dao Ancestor cultivators at the same time, so it's absolutely impossible to give you 50 places!"

"Let's not talk about the quota issue for now, let's test the size of the origin lake first!"

Ye Tian said.

Instantly, the consciousness of a half-step domain ancestor entered the inner space of the Ancient Realm Tree.

Bang!!!!!

A huge Origin Lake appeared in Ye Tian's consciousness exploration.

This Origin Lake is very large, dozens of times larger than the ordinary Ancient Origin Lake.

"This Origin Lake is huge, it can probably accommodate 800 people to enter it to cultivate!"

The main road of the Thunder Tribulation Palace.

"That's right, then let's allocate it according to the 800 places, and the half-step domain ancestor and above are not allowed to enter, after all, the Ancient Realm Body is of little use to us, and our half-step Domain Ancestor body is much stronger than the Ancient Realm Body!"

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor Dao.

800 places, after discussion, the preliminary distribution result was that Heifeng Mountain was divided into 400 places, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace was given 400 places.

But just when both parties agreed, Ye Tian spoke: "I don't agree, I think Black Wind Mountain should be able to get 450 places, and Heavenly Emperor Palace should get 350 places!"

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord was furious, and glared at Ye Tiandao angrily: "Wanfa Dao Ancestor, don't go too far, your Jinchen Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain has agreed, what qualifications do you have to oppose an invincible Dao Ancestor? You still want those 50 places? If you ask for a place, you will ask your Jinchen Dao Ancestor to go, and the 400 places in our Heavenly Emperor Palace must not be moved!"

At this time, Jinchen Daozu also felt that Ye Tian was a little too much.

What's more, he is the team leader, he agreed, Ye Tian still objected, so he ignored his decision a little.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, this matter ends here, I agree to divide 30 places for your human race, so it's okay!"

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor Dao.

After all, Ye Tian's potential is very great, and now that he is only in the Invincible Dao Ancestor realm, he has the combat power of the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Realm, and he will definitely be able to become a half-step domain ancestor of the One Realm in the future, so he is not willing to offend the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor too much.

"Jinchen Daozu, I know how to do things!"

Ye Tian said.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled in front of the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord, and said: "Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, let's make a bet, you and I will fight, limited to three minutes, if I don't fall behind, 50 places will belong to me, if I lose, Black Wind Mountain promised me 30 places, I will be the master and give it to your Heavenly Emperor Palace, how about it?"

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor!"

Jin Chen Daozu was anxious.

You're asking for a quota, this is giving a quota!
